controlplane.name: Control Plane
controlplane.description: Hybrid multi-cloud platform for deploying and managing containerized workloads (serverless, standard, cron, stateful) across AWS, GCP, Azure, and private clouds from a unified interface. Abstracts cloud provider differences behind a consistent API, CLI, Console, Terraform and Pulumi providers, and MCP Server — covering workloads, GVCs, identity-based secret access, autoscaling, multi-cloud networking, and managed Kubernetes.
